data.title: Phia raises $8 million to scale AI shopping platform
data.description: Phia offers an iOS app and browser extension that compares prices, calculates resale value, summarizes product details, and tracks price changes in real time.

data.title: LeafLink taps a new CEO to accelerate cannabis ecommerce
data.description: Ashwin Ra most recently served as CEO of ezCater, where he led the company’s transformation into an enterprise food platform.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What new data shows about how to increase conversion rates
data.description: Data, survey responses and reporting in Digital Commerce 360's 2025 Ecommerce Conversion Report show what's working to increase rate.

data.title: Microsoft Copilot adds commerce experience using Curated for You
data.description: The new commerce experience in Copilot will feature results from retailers including Revolve, Steve Madden and Rent the Runway.

data.title: Q&A: How agentic AI Is redefining B2B digital commerce
data.description: This interview with Lance Owide, general manager of B2B at Commerce.com Inc., explores how emerging agentic AI systems are reshaping digital commerce for distributors and manufacturers.
